_comment: Live-sim viewer appearance + window. Read by the Godot viewer (TerrainLoader.gd) at startup via the --viewer-config launch arg (run_sim.sh). Edit and relaunch run_sim.sh to change; independent of the terrain build. window.mode is windowed | maximized | fullscreen | exclusive_fullscreen. Colors/vectors are [r, g, b]. Terrain uses an affine grade: out = albedo*gain + offset (gain default [1,1,1], offset default [0,0,0], offset may be negative), then contrast then saturation. Sky top_color/horizon_color are ABSOLUTE. contrast/saturation/brightness are multipliers where 1.0 = source.
